system.description:
Muscle represents your physical strength and has several important uses in Wandering Heroes of Ogre Gate. With a Muscle Skill roll you can lift, break or throw objects for instance. Perhaps more importantly, you often add your Muscle to Melee Weapon Damage, usually a number of d10 equal to your Ranks in the skill. In addition, certain items require base Muscle Ranks in order to be used without penalties. So Muscle is a crucial Skill.

For more detailed information on Muscle and lifting objects see LIFTING AND MOVING OBJECTS in CHAPTER TWO: RULES.
system.source: Wandering Heroes of Ogre Gate, Chapter 1: Skills
